step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and styling, body proportions, heather grey oversized cropped sweatshirt and wide-leg sweat pants outfit, and the entire premium gym locker room scene including the wood lockers, wooden bench, folded white gym towel, and leather duffel bag — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. She is now holding the Alluvi product in her right hand at chest level: her right arm bent at the elbow, wrist relaxed, fingers curved naturally around the box with thumb on the front face, index and middle fingers wrapping the right side, ring and pinky tucked under the bottom edge, the box held with the long side oriented vertically and the front face turned toward the camera so her downward gaze lands on it. The product is approximately 7 inches wide, sized realistically relative to her hand. Her body posture and arm angle may shift slightly from the at-side resting position to make the chest-level holding pose look natural and not stamped on. Both hands must remain visible in the frame — her right hand visibly grips the product, her left hand continues tucking her damp hair behind her left ear. Do not hide either hand in pockets, behind her back, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color; the scene's warm light should illuminate the white surface as light, not tint the white amber. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: warm sconce lighting from behind, soft overhead locker-room light, a gentle golden cast across the wood lockers, with a soft shadow falling forward and slightly to her left.
